Couple things I wanna say

Apparently there’s a site that can steal a bot’s personality if they have proxies on. That really sucks for creators but I’m still gonna keep proxies on. I wouldn’t want people to be locked out of chatting with any of my bots.

Not gonna go too much into it cause some other bots have been deleted for it, but rip Dlayzie.
